description: User pauses on the add-ons page, likely reviewing the 'Online Captain's Pack' and seat selection options.
User scrolls up to review the trip summary and then scrolls back down to the bottom of the page.
frame_description: The page content shifts vertically as the user reviews the 'Review trip' section before returning to the add-ons.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'CONTINUE' button.
User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button to proceed with the booking.
A loading overlay appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' and a progress spinner.
frame_description: The screen is dimmed by a white overlay with a central loading animation.

description: The page navigates from the baggage selection to the 'Travellers' details entry screen.
frame_description: The loading overlay disappears and the new 'Travellers' page content is rendered.
